title: Coordinate List
description: This Datapack shows your coordinates in the server list
body:
**This Datapack shows your coordinates in the server list. (And in Chat)**
#

The Coordinates will change colour depending on the dimension you're in.

![overworld coordinates](https://i.imgur.com/3KI66WU.png)

![nether coordinates](https://i.imgur.com/L3wXyVR.png)

![end coordinates](https://i.imgur.com/KYV6muf.png)

## 

If you want to hide your Coordinates do /trigger clist_trigger_display

If you want to remove this pack use /function clist:remove to remove all created teams and objectives.

## 

This pack works with multiple players on the server.
